description_for_human: Symprio is a global AI & automation consultancy offering RPA, AI development, digital transformation, ERP, and corporate training across APAC, US, UK & Middle East.
description_for_model: Symprio is a global AI & automation consultancy headquartered in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. Services: RPA (UiPath, Power Automate), AI Application Development (chatbots, agents, RAG, LLM), Agentic AI, Process Assessment, Digital Transformation, ERP & Oracle, Custom Software Development, Digital Workforce. Training: RPA, AI/GenAI, Corporate Workshops. 45+ clients, 400+ bots deployed, 15+ countries. Contact: contact@symprio.com, +60 13 880 2574.
